security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: Overseer discovers every machine on your Tailscale tailnet and connects to them over RDP or VNC, with credentials kept in an encrypted vault. Cross-platform: Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.
